stories.title: Spain's persistence pays off to win 2026 World Cup...
stories.summary: So that's it! The 2026 World Cup is over and Spain have been crowned champions. Here's how they won it, how Argentina lost it, and everything in-between.

stories.title: In a tournament dominated by superstars, Spain's t...
Torres fires Spain past Argentina for 2nd WC title...
stories.summary: Ferran Torres clinched Spain's second men's World Cup title with an extra-time winner against reigning world champions Argentina in a bad-tempered final.

stories.title: Tearful Messi says Spain 'better' team in WC final...
stories.summary: Lionel Messi was left in tears after he was unable to conjure up one more piece of magic to save Argentina from defeat to Spain in Sunday's World Cup final at MetLife Stadium.

stories.title: Rodri wins Golden Ball as Spain dominate awards
stories.summary: Spain claimed a hat trick of individual awards after beating Argentina to claim their second men's World Cup title Sunday at MetLife Stadium.
